title: Stephanolirion narcissoides
intro: Stephanolirion narcissoides is a perennial plant species belonging to the Liliaceae family, commonly known as the "narcissus lilyturf." This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The bioactive constituents of Stephanolirion narcissoides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions and infusions, as well as being used in the production of modern pharmaceuticals.
taxonomy: Stephanolirion narcissoides belongs to the family Colchicaceae. This plant is a type of flowering bulbous perennial. Stephanolirion narcissoides is a rare and lesser-known species of the Colchicaceae family.
